_comment: Golden signature fixture. Any compliant SDK must reproduce the exact HMAC-SHA256 value given the same inputs and secret. This verifies cross-language signing compatibility.
notes: canonical_json is produced by json.dumps(inputs, sort_keys=True)
All keys are sorted alphabetically (context < from < id < intent < payload < timestamp < to)
Within nested objects, keys are also sorted (priority < task, session_id alone)
The timestamp in inputs is the auth.timestamp value set during signing, NOT the message.timestamp
